metadata.fund_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth

content:
About HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Mid-Cap companies.
Strengths: 1Y and 10Y annualised returns higher than category average; Lower expense ratio: 0.75%; Higher alpha: 2.83 
The fund has generated returns higher than benchmark - NIFTY Midcap 150 Total Return Index - in the last 3Y 
Weaknesses: 3Y and 5Y annualised returns lower than category average

Tax implication
If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

content:
Q: How to Invest in HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: You can easily invest in HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

Q: How much expense ratio is charged by HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The term Expense Ratio used for HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. The Expense Ratio of HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth is 0.75% as of 04 Jul 2026...

content:
Q: How to Redeem HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: If you want to sell your HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

metadata.fund_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth

content:
Q: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
